fields.title: agent: harden AgentManager (GC, ACL, cascading teardown, operation gate)
fields.description: Port four manager-layer improvements from erg-effect to tau's AgentManager. These are all at the manager/control layer and do not require pi SDK changes or control over the agent execution loop.nn1. Operation gate (semaphore) for mutation safetyn2. Parent-child relationship trackingn3. Parent-child ACL enforcement on send/closen4. Cascading teardown on closen5. GC for idle agent evictionnnOut of scope: delegation events, session persistence, auto-resume (all require pi agent loop control).
fields.close_reason: All 5 tasks completed: operation gate, parent tracking, ACL, cascading teardown, GC.
